professionalSummary.text: Project Leader with 10+ years across the SDLC, leading cross-functional teams at TechCorp for systems handling 20,000+ RPM — expert in Agile leadership, stakeholder alignment, and delivery management.

Built a custom debugging engine that reduced incident backlog by 70% and cut RCA time from ~2 hours to ~30 minutes; automated operational workflows with n8n + AI, recovering ~18–20 hours/week of engineering capacity.

Mentored squads of up to 9 engineers, driving 4 promotions in 18 months, while owning end-to-end delivery of complex cross-functional programs that required negotiating foundational architectural changes.

coreCompetencies.title: Technical Program & Delivery Management
coreCompetencies.description: 5+ years owning end-to-end delivery of cross-functional technical programs, defining roadmaps, milestones, and success criteria aligned with multi-quarter business objectives. Skilled at breaking down epics into technical stories, managing dependencies, and driving execution across teams.

coreCompetencies.title: Agile Leadership & Process Optimization
coreCompetencies.description: 3+ years as Scrum Master driving sprint planning, quarterly roadmap alignment, and Agile ceremonies for engineering squads up to 9 members. Modernized operating models through Jira workflow restructuring and AI-enabled automation.

coreCompetencies.title: Systems Engineering & Automation
coreCompetencies.description: Strong systems thinking applied to high-scale architectures (20,000+ RPM). Designed and deployed a Shadow Processing & Debugging Engine for incident management at scale. Implemented n8n and AI-powered workflows to automate scheduling, ticket creation, and documentation.

coreCompetencies.title: Team Development & Mentorship
coreCompetencies.description: Mentored 9 engineers across skill levels, facilitating technical decision-making, enforcing code quality standards, and driving career growth — resulting in 4 promotions. Built a positive team culture focused on continuous improvement and ownership.

professionalExperience.description: Led a cross-functional squad of 9 responsible for critical platform APIs with traffic peaks exceeding 20,000+ RPM.

achievements.text: Owned end-to-end delivery of the 'Product Bundles' technical program — a complex initiative enabling inventory combination at scale. Defined milestones, success criteria, and multi-quarter roadmap; orchestrated cross-functional alignment across UX, Product, and Architecture teams.

metrics.value: [NEEDS METRIC: number of users impacted or revenue increase]

achievements.text: Architected and deployed a custom Shadow Processing & Debugging Engine for a high-frequency event pipeline handling 20,000+ RPM. Built a data-driven business case that overcame initial scope resistance; reduced incident backlog by 70% and cut RCA time from ~2 hours to ~30 minutes.

Overhauled squad operating model by acting as Scrum Master, restructuring Jira workflows, and implementing n8n + AI copilots to automate sprint planning, epic/story/task creation, ticket sizing, scheduling, and documentation. Recovered ~18–20 hours/week of engineering capacity.

Mentored 9 engineers across skill levels, facilitating architectural decisions for high-traffic solutions, driving code quality best practices, and protecting the team from scope creep through strict roadmap prioritization. Drove 4 promotions in 18 months.

Designed and implemented scalable Java backend services for high-traffic components, optimizing performance under peak loads exceeding 20,000+ RPM. Applied SOLID principles and REST API best practices.
Transformed CI/CD and Git workflows, reducing deployment friction and improving code quality gates, enabling faster and more reliable continuous delivery.

metrics.value: [NEEDS METRIC: deployment frequency or reduction in deployment time]

achievements.text: Mentored Junior and Semi-Senior developers through structured code reviews and pair programming, accelerating their path to independent contributors.
Maintained and evolved internal Java core components for the platform ecosystem, ensuring 99.9% uptime during traffic spikes and implementing caching strategies for high-concurrency stability.
Reviewed 8–12 pull requests per week across a squad of 9, applying quality standards and identifying architectural risks before deployment.
Led functional analysis and backlog refinement sessions, translating product requirements into technical specifications and RESTful endpoint designs with OAuth authentication.
Developed and maintained internal microservices and REST APIs, enforcing strict coding standards and SOLID OOP principles that reduced technical debt and improved system reliability.
